creator: danny@dannywarren.com
text:
Comment on attachment 203134
Update to 0.33, Add FLAVORS, mention flavors in pkg-descr

Approved!

Both submitter and I have run cnagios through several testport runs using both the nagios3 and nagios4 flavors.

This commit will require a MOVED entry for the new default flavor, such as:

net-mgmt/cnagios|net-mgmt/cnagios@nagios3|2020-11-17|Moved to nagios3 or nagios4 flavored version
